title: Bloomberg BQL Query
description: A Bloomberg Query Language (BQL) query request that specifies securities, data fields, and analytical functions for retrieving financial data from Bloomberg's Enterprise Access Point.

expression.description: BQL query expression using get(), for(), where(), and group() functions to define data retrieval logic. Supports field references, mathematical operations, date functions, and filtering.
examples: get(px_last) for(['AAPL US Equity', 'MSFT US Equity'])

universe.description: Optional universe identifier providing a default security set for the query expression when no explicit for() clause is specified.

parameters.description: Key-value pairs for parameterized queries, enabling dynamic substitution of values within the BQL expression at runtime.

QueryPreferences.description: Configuration preferences that control query execution behavior, output formatting, and data handling.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for converting monetary values in the result set.

calendar.description: Trading calendar identifier used for business day calculations and date alignment.

dateFormat.description: Date formatting convention for output values.

fill.description: Strategy for handling missing data points in the result set.

periodicitySelection.description: Data frequency for time series data retrieval.

pricingSource.description: Preferred pricing source for market data.
